name: Kellogg's Bran Buds with Psyllium Spice Muffins (Mini Tops)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Kellogg's Bran Buds with Pshyllium
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together flour, baking powder, pumpkin pie spice, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, stir together cereal and boiling water; let stand 2 minutes or until water is absorbed.
3. Add sugar into softened cereal; stir until well combined.
4. Stir in milk and Lighter Bake.
5. Add Egg - Second Nature and raisins; beat well.
6. Gradually add flour mixture, stirring just until combined.
7. Portion batter evenly into lightly greased large muffin pans cups.
8. Bake at 400º for about 20 minutes or until tops of muffins are light golden brown and spring back when lightly touched.
- Alternatively, use a mini muffin tops pan (e.g., Muffin Munchies) and bake at 350º for about 18 minutes.
